message:
feat(core,parser,planner): add FK enforcement on UPDATE/DELETE and wire time-travel parsing

- Add foreign key constraint enforcement for UPDATE and DELETE operations
  in Connection: collect affected rows, check parent-side for orphaned
  children, execute cascading FK actions, and validate child-side FK
  references against parent tables
- Wire parse_time_travel_clause() into the actual table reference
  parsing paths (previously only defined but never called), enabling
  FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF syntax in queries
- Fix CAST affinity mapping: use uppercase SQLite affinity codes
  (D=Integer, B=Text, A=Blob/None, E=Real, C=Numeric) matching the
  documented convention
- Update txn_slots_e2e_artifact.json with latest benchmark timings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
